nodes.label: ECON 1
nodes.title: Principles of Microeconomics
nodes.description: Supply, demand, market equilibrium, and consumer choice—pre-major foundation for financial economics.

nodes.label: ECON 2
nodes.title: Principles of Macroeconomics
nodes.description: National income, inflation, unemployment, and fiscal and monetary policy.

nodes.label: MATH 3A
nodes.title: Calculus I
nodes.description: Limits, derivatives, and integrals—core preparation for probability, finance, and numerical methods.

nodes.label: MATH 3B
nodes.title: Calculus II
nodes.description: Advanced integration, sequences, and series for upper-division math and statistics.

nodes.label: MATH 4A
nodes.title: Linear Algebra
nodes.description: Matrices, vector spaces, and linear systems—essential for statistics and computational finance.

nodes.label: ECON 10A
nodes.title: Intermediate Microeconomics
nodes.description: Formal microeconomic theory: utility maximization, production, and market structure.

nodes.label: CMPSC 8
nodes.title: Introduction to Python
nodes.description: Python programming for data analysis—required preparation for quantitative finance coursework.

nodes.label: MATH 6A
nodes.title: Vector Calculus I
nodes.description: Multivariable calculus and partial derivatives for advanced math and modeling courses.

nodes.label: PSTAT 10
nodes.title: Probability and Statistics
nodes.description: Introductory probability and statistics; gateway to the FMS upper-division core.

nodes.label: MATH 4B
nodes.title: Differential Equations
nodes.description: Ordinary differential equations with applications in economics and mathematical modeling.

nodes.label: MATH 8
nodes.title: Transition to Proofs
nodes.description: Proof techniques and discrete mathematics; prerequisite for MATH 117 and PSTAT 120A.

nodes.label: MATH 6B
nodes.title: Vector Calculus II
nodes.description: Vector calculus theorems and applications in physics, engineering, and applied math.

nodes.label: PSTAT 120A
nodes.title: Probability
nodes.description: Rigorous probability theory for statistics, finance, and stochastic modeling.

nodes.label: PSTAT 120B
nodes.title: Statistics
nodes.description: Statistical inference, estimation, and hypothesis testing methods.

nodes.label: PSTAT 160A
nodes.title: Mathematical Statistics
nodes.description: Theoretical statistics: sufficiency, estimation theory, and statistical decision making.

nodes.label: PSTAT 160B
nodes.title: Mathematical Statistics II
nodes.description: Advanced topics in statistical theory and inference for graduate-level preparation.

nodes.label: PSTAT 126
nodes.title: Regression Analysis
nodes.description: Linear regression, model selection, and applied predictive analytics.

nodes.label: MATH 117
nodes.title: Series and Sequences
nodes.description: Convergence, power series, and Fourier series—prep for numerical analysis sequence.

nodes.label: MATH 104A
nodes.title: Numerical Analysis
nodes.description: Numerical methods for root-finding, interpolation, and solving linear systems.

nodes.label: PSTAT 170
nodes.title: Mathematical Finance
nodes.description: Derivatives pricing, portfolio optimization, and stochastic models in finance.

nodes.label: MATH 104B
nodes.title: Numerical Analysis II
nodes.description: Numerical ODE/PDE methods and approximation theory for applied mathematics.

nodes.label: MATH 104C
nodes.title: Numerical Analysis III
nodes.description: Advanced numerical techniques and computational methods for scientific computing.

nodes.label: Quant Finance
nodes.title: Quantitative Finance / Trading
nodes.description: Derivatives, algorithmic trading, and risk modeling at banks, hedge funds, and fintech firms.

nodes.label: Risk Analyst
nodes.title: Risk Management & Insurance
nodes.description: Measure and mitigate market, credit, and operational risk for financial institutions.

nodes.label: Data Science
nodes.title: Data Science & Analytics
nodes.description: Build statistical and ML models for product, marketing, and business analytics teams.

nodes.label: Grad School
nodes.title: MS/PhD in Statistics or Financial Math
nodes.description: Research careers in statistics, financial mathematics, or econometrics at top graduate programs.
